metadata.description: Internal Claude Code plugins for OhMyHotel engineering — git workflow, PR automation, release management following the company Git Branch Strategy.

plugins.name: omh-git-workflow
plugins.description: 11 slash commands that automate the OMH git branch strategy: new-branch, commit, open-pr, check-pr, release, cherry-pick, reset-develop, reset-staging, sync-local, hotfix, rollback.
